zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mott於1629年5月5日出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其時，她的父親Adam Mott32歲，母親Elizabeth Creel29歲。她於1647年6月16日與Edward Thurston II在美國羅得島紐波特波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年9月2日在美國羅得島紐波特享年65歲，埋葬在美國羅得島紐波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Mott于1629年5月5日出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其时，她的父亲Adam Mott32岁，母亲Elizabeth Creel29岁。她于1647年6月16日与Edward Thurston II在美国罗德岛州紐波特波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年9月2日在美国罗德岛州紐波特享年65岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州紐波特。

nameMeanings.name: Mott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Motte, a pet form of Matilda. There has probably been some confusion with Moat .
German: topographic name for someone who lived by or owned property in a marshy area, from Middle High German mot ‘mud, swamp’.

variants.name: Motts
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Mott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Moat
meanings: English: from Middle English mote ‘moat, protective ditch’ (Old French mote, motte ‘mound, embankment’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived at or by a moat, or habitational, from one of many minor places so named in England and Scotland. There has probably been some confusion with Mott .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mott was born on 5 May 1629, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Adam Mott, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Creel, was 29. She married Edward Thurston II on 16 June 1647, in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 2 September 1694, in Newport, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 65, and was buried in Newport, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mott est née le 5 mai 1629, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam Mott, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Creel, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Thurston II le 16 juin 1647, à Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 septembre 1694, à Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mott am 5. Mai 1629 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Mott 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Creel 29. Sie hat am 16. Juni 1647 in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Edward Thurston II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. September 1694 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mott è nata il il 5 maggio 1629 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Adam Mott, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Creel, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Edward Thurston II il 16 giugno 1647, nel Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 2 settembre 1694, nel Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mottが1629年5月5日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Adam Mottは32歳，母Elizabeth Creelは29歳であった。1647年6月16日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトポルトスモウスでEdward Thurston IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年9月2日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mott(이)가 1629년 5월 5일 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Mott(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Creel(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1647년 6월 16일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 포츠모우스에서 Edward Thurston II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 9월 2일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mott nasceu em 5 de maio de 1629, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Mott, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Creel, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Thurston II em 16 de junho de 1647, em Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1694, em Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mott родилась 5 мая 1629 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Mott было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Creel, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Thurston II 16 июня 1647 г. в местности порцмоут, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 2 сентября 1694 г. в местности нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Mott nació el 5 de mayo de 1629, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Mott, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Creel, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Edward Thurston II el 16 de junio de 1647, en Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1694, en Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
